home.title: Shorten Your Links with Min.io
home.description: Turn long, messy URLs into clean, shareable short links in seconds. Free, fast & fun!
home.terms: By using Min.io you agree to our Terms of Service.
home.includeUsername: Include my username in the link

auth.title: Welcome to Min.io
auth.subtitle: Sign in to track and manage your links
auth.terms: By signing in you agree to our Terms of Service.
auth.error_oauth_failed: OAuth sign-in failed. Please try again.

donate.title: Support the Min.io Project
donate.description: Scan the QR code below or copy the bank account number to transfer quickly. Every contribution helps us improve Min.io.

title.about: About Min.io - The Smartest Way to Share Your Links

about.title: The Smartest Way to Share Your Links
about.description: Our platform transforms long, complex URLs into clean and trackable assets. We help creators, teams, and businesses optimize every click with speed, insight, and reliability.

instant.title: Instant Shortening
instant.desc: Create concise, memorable links in seconds for social media, messages, and print campaigns.

analytics.title: Real-time Analytics
analytics.desc: Track clicks, referral channels, and performance trends to improve your link strategy.

secure.title: Secure & Reliable
secure.desc: Keep links protected with stable infrastructure and dependable uptime for daily operations.

contactInfo.title: Contact Information
contactInfo.desc: Need help with a technical issue or enterprise request? Contact us through the channels below.

404.title: 404 - Page Not Found
404.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist. It might have been removed or is temporarily unavailable.

400.title: Oops! Something went wrong with the redirection
400.description: Missing URL parameter. Make sure the URL is correct and try again. If the problem persists, please contact our support team.

qrcode.title: Scan QR Code to Access Your Link
qrcode.cta: Share your short link with others by scanning the QR code or downloading it for later use.
